phases: Phase 1: Substantiate SKILL.md gains Step 6.8 (Seal Hash Integrity Gate)

limitations: V1 wires the existing hash_guard helper into /qor-substantiate Step 6.8 only. It does not change the Step 7 Merkle-seal computation path or add new hash modes.
V1 validates locally produced hash strings before they enter the ledger body. Remote attestation is out of scope.
non_goals: Adding new validators beyond validate_sha256 and require_toolkit_modules already exposed by qor/scripts/hash_guard.py.
exclusions: No changes to prompt compiler behavior.

originating_remediation: GH #48 (Phase 59 Phase 2 dropped during Phase 60 session-consolidation)
